arts.ttl: Italy to follow England and Germany by trialing in-stadium announcements for VAR calls
arts.sum: The Italian league will offer more transparency over video review decisions, including limited in-stadium announcements of the referee’s conversations with the VAR. The league’s governing body announced on Monday that it would trial the system in the remaining matches of the Italian Cup, limiting it to the explanation of the decisions taken by the referee after reviewing incidents on a sideline monitor.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel now questions what happened at Arsenal ahead of England vs Latvia

arts.sum: Morgan Gibbs-White has been included in the England matchday squad for tonight’s clash with Latvia. The Nottingham Forest midfielder was not part of the squad for Friday’s 2-0 win over Albania but is included ahead of tonight’s meeting with Latvia at Wembley. England take on Latvia as their 2026 World Cup qualification campaign continues.
